prestazioni: MA10ET (1.0L turbocharged inline-4) engine swap to a fully built MA12S (1.2L SOHC) with a custom-forged crankshaft (JUN Auto forged crank, 88mm stroke) and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons, paired with Tomei 264° duration camshafts and a HKS GT-SS turbocharger (TD04-15G upgrade) for 18 psi of boost, targeting 180 hp at the wheels on 98 RON fuel

Custom 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold (hand-fabricated by Trust/GReddy) with a 3-inch diameter HKS Hi-Power Spec-L exhaust system, featuring a straight-pipe design with a single HKS SSQV blow-off valve and a custom 2.5-inch downpipe for optimal turbo spool

Full standalone Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with a custom wiring harness (by Wireworks Japan), integrated with a Link G4+ wideband controller, AEM X-Series oil pressure/temperature sensors, and a custom intercooler setup (Garrett front-mount core with custom aluminum piping by HKS)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PB-01 aero kit (Pao-specific, not the generic K11 version), including over-fenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser, all in raw carbon fiber with a clear satin finish

Custom 15x7-inch Work Equip 01 wheels (ET0 offset) with 165/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires, powder-coated in Nissan’s original “Pao Gray” (code: KH3) with gold hardware and custom center caps featuring the Pao’s retro “P” logo

Full interior retrim by Auto Executive (Japan) in vintage-inspired brown leatherette with white stitching, including a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede-wrapped) and a full digital gauge cluster (Defi Advance BF series) replacing the stock analog dials
